title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: June 6, 2024
summary: June 6, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to decrease this week at a greater (double) rate of 5.12% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 2.53%), from the level on 05/30/2024 of 12.097 M km 2 to 11.478 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program...
